blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the no-show and late-cancel policy.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the no-show and late-cancel policy.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a no-show and late-cancel policy for calls. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or implementation of such a policy. The linked use case mentions a standard no-show policy but lacks specific evidence to validate this requirement, leading to a conclusion that the validation is inconclusive.
